# ICML 2025

**Coverage status:** Pending

**Checked on:** 2026-07-12

**Official audit sources:** [Source 1](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/>) · [Source 2](<https://github.com/mlresearch/v267/tree/3a328812b192086cd80b20eb56a5bb99c69a3afd/_posts>) · [Source 3](<https://icml.cc/virtual/2025/papers.html>) · [Source 4](<https://icml.cc/virtual/2025/events/workshop>) · [Source 5](<https://icml.cc/virtual/2025/affinity_events>)

**Coverage notes:** All 3,330 archival PMLR records were screened: 3,257 main and 73 Position. Five eligible main papers were cataloged, and no Position paper passed the strict scope screen. Workshop and affinity remain omitted from tracks\_checked because their exact official event and contributed-paper rosters could not be read.

5 verified papers curated for direct relevance to quantitative finance and asset management. Tracks are separated so main-conference, position, and workshop status remains visible.

## Main Conference (5)

### [AlphaQCM: Alpha Discovery in Finance with Distributional Reinforcement Learning](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=3sXMHlhBSs>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-icml-zhu-alphaqcm

**Authors:** Zhoufan Zhu, Ke Zhu

**Venue / year:** ICML · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Alpha Modeling

**Assets / frequency:** Equities

**Identifiers:** OpenReview 3sXMHlhBSs

**Focus:** Uses distributional reinforcement learning to search for complementary formulaic stock alphas under sparse, non-stationary rewards.

**Why it matters:** Automates the discovery of combined signals intended to improve stock selection across large equity universes.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/zhu25ag.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=3sXMHlhBSs>)

---

### [Decision Making under the Exponential Family: Distributionally Robust Optimisation with Bayesian Ambiguity Sets](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=r9HlTuCQfr>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-icml-dellaporta-bayesian-ambiguity-sets

**Authors:** Charita Dellaporta, Patrick O’Hara, Theodoros Damoulas

**Venue / year:** ICML · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Portfolio Optimization · Risk Management

**Assets / frequency:** Not specified

**Identifiers:** OpenReview r9HlTuCQfr

**Focus:** Builds posterior-informed ambiguity sets for distributionally robust decisions and evaluates them on portfolio optimization under model uncertainty.

**Why it matters:** Offers portfolio decisions that hedge estimation uncertainty while retaining tractable solve times and comparable robustness.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/dellaporta25a.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=r9HlTuCQfr>)

---

### [HyperIV: Real-time Implied Volatility Smoothing](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=o9jtS7HupI>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-icml-yang-hyperiv

**Authors:** Yongxin Yang, Wenqi Chen, Chao Shu, Timothy Hospedales

**Venue / year:** ICML · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Derivatives · Market Microstructure

**Assets / frequency:** Derivatives

**Identifiers:** OpenReview o9jtS7HupI

**Focus:** Constructs arbitrage-free implied-volatility surfaces in real time from sparse option quotes and evaluates them across eight index options.

**Why it matters:** Supports faster, more stable derivative valuation and trading decisions when full volatility surfaces must be updated from limited market observations.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/yang25d.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=o9jtS7HupI>)

---

### [Latent Variable Estimation in Bayesian Black-Litterman Models](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=v8ipdsBPEx>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-icml-lin-bayesian-black-litterman

**Authors:** Thomas Yuan-Lung Lin, Jerry Yao-Chieh Hu, Paul W. Chiou, Peter Lin

**Venue / year:** ICML · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Asset Allocation · Portfolio Optimization

**Assets / frequency:** Equities

**Identifiers:** OpenReview v8ipdsBPEx

**Focus:** Treats Black–Litterman views and their uncertainty as latent variables learned from market data to generate stable portfolio weights.

**Why it matters:** Improves risk-adjusted allocation while reducing turnover relative to Markowitz and index baselines.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/lin25g.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=v8ipdsBPEx>)

---

### [LOB-Bench: Benchmarking Generative AI for Finance - an Application to Limit Order Book Data](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=CXPpYJpYXQ>)

**Catalog ID:** 2025-icml-nagy-lob-bench

**Authors:** Peer Nagy, Sascha Yves Frey, Kang Li, Bidipta Sarkar, Svitlana Vyetrenko, Stefan Zohren, Ani Calinescu, Jakob Nicolaus Foerster

**Venue / year:** ICML · 2025

**Track / presentation:** Main · Not Specified

**Status / verified:** Published · 2026-07-12

**Topics:** Market Microstructure · Synthetic Data · Evaluation

**Assets / frequency:** Tick

**Identifiers:** OpenReview CXPpYJpYXQ

**Focus:** Benchmarks generative limit-order-book streams with distributional, order-flow, price-response, and market-impact diagnostics.

**Why it matters:** Provides a decision-facing test suite for deciding whether synthetic microstructure data are credible enough for trading-model development.

**Links:** [Official venue record](<https://proceedings.mlr.press/v267/nagy25a.html>) · [Paper](<https://openreview.net/forum?id=CXPpYJpYXQ>)
